name: stellaroid-earn
description: Green Belt stack: Soroban contract + Express API + React/Vite/Freighter

scripts.install:deps: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.netlify:build: npm ci --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
